/usr/bin/c++  -D_GLIBCXX_USE_CXX11_ABI=0 -std=c++11 -O2 -Wall -Wno-comment -Wno-return-type -Wno-switch -Wno-missing-noreturn -Wno-unused-function -Wno-ignored-attributes -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test-fp16.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/test-fp16.dir/test/test_fp16.cpp.o" -o test-fp16  -Wl,-rpath,/home/me/development/pytorch_dlprim/build/dlprimitives/CLBlast:/home/me/development/pytorch_dlprim/build/dlprimitives/CLBlast/tart:/home/me/development/pytorch_dlprim/build/dlprimitives/CLBlast/tart/subprocess/subprocess libclblast.so.1.6.3 tart/libtart.so /usr/lib/libvulkan.so tart/subprocess/subprocess/libsubprocess.so -lstdc++fs -ldl
